'''Vicria''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Mungra]] with [[Color/Legends|orange]] [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] and red-tawny [[Hair/Legends|hair]]. She ran a [[Tapcafe/Legends|tapcafe]] in [[Makrin City]] on [[Shelkonwa]]. In [[0 ABY/Legends|0.6 ABY]] Vicria let the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] leader, [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], work in her tapcafe while she was a fugitive on Shelkonwa, wanted by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==Appearances==
*[[Allegiance (novel)|''Allegiance'']] {{Ab|Allegiance (audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
